extDescription.message: Save the paper on the current page to LumenCite with one click.

errNotPaired.message: Not paired — paste the connect code in the options page

errUnreachable.message: Cannot reach LumenCite — is the app running?

errAuth.message: Pairing expired — re-pair in the options page

errDisabled.message: Web clipper is disabled in LumenCite settings

optionsInstructions.message: In LumenCite, open Settings → Chat / MCP → Web Clipper, enable it, copy the connect code, and paste it below.

optionsPingFailed.message: Could not reach LumenCite. Check that the app is running and the clipper is enabled.
